headline: Why Intuitive Surgical’s Strong Quarter Still Spooked Investors
summary: Intuitive Surgical shares fell about 10% after Q2 2026 revenue rose 19% but guidance for da Vinci procedure growth wasn't raised, pushing ISRG below its 200-week moving average.
